sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110694" key="fqe/wmen" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθέωμεν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθέωσι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθήῃ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθῇσιν</orth>, <sense id="n110694.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φθάνω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
